prompt: A moody wall of static chatbot mockup cards freezes in place, then subtly fractures into pixel dust to signal outdated workflow.

fields.scene: dark cinematic studio with floating UI panels
fields.subject: abstract chat mockup cards, no people
fields.action: beat 1 (0-2s) static cards drift slowly; beat 2 (2-4s) cards crack and dissolve into clean particles
fields.lighting: high-contrast edge light, premium tech mood
fields.constraints: keep text centered and legible; no logos; audience-safe
fields.negative: no real people, no copyrighted brands, no jitter, no flicker

prompt: A polished product dashboard morphs into a node-based design studio interface, showing a fast transition from planning to making.

fields.scene: clean product UI environment, dark neutral backdrop
fields.subject: abstract SaaS dashboard and studio UI panels
fields.action: beat 1 (0-2s) dashboard cards align; beat 2 (2-4s) smooth morph into flow editor canvas
fields.camera: subtle lateral slide with gentle zoom
fields.palette: graphite, steel, LinkedIn-like blue accents, white
fields.constraints: UI text should stay sharp and readable
fields.negative: no human figures, no brand logos, no chaotic motion

prompt: A conversation canvas shows turn nodes, user-turn nodes, and condition branches connecting in a clean choreography.

fields.scene: top-down view of a dark node canvas
fields.subject: conversation nodes and animated connector lines
fields.action: beat 1 (0-2s) core nodes appear; beat 2 (2-4s) branch lines snap into place
fields.palette: ink black, cyan blue, mint, off-white
fields.negative: no people, no clutter, no unreadable tiny text

prompt: A live chat prototype preview opens, then toggles smoothly between desktop and mobile frames to show realistic simulation.

fields.scene: dark interface stage with two device frames
fields.subject: chat preview panel and phone frame
fields.action: beat 1 (0-2s) desktop preview active; beat 2 (2-4s) transition to mobile frame
fields.constraints: text and UI controls must be readable
fields.negative: no humans, no extreme motion blur

prompt: A subtle 'Saved' pulse appears on a flow, followed by a clean JSON export and import interaction to imply engineering handoff readiness.

fields.scene: focused editor toolbar and export panel
fields.subject: autosave indicator and JSON file actions
fields.action: beat 1 (0-2s) save pulse confirms changes; beat 2 (2-4s) export/import cards animate in
fields.palette: charcoal, white, cool gray, blue accent
fields.negative: no people, no logos, no visual noise

prompt: Final hero frame with product UI in the background and a bold call-to-action title card in front.

fields.scene: premium dark gradient background with subtle particle depth
fields.subject: product UI silhouette and CTA typography
fields.action: beat 1 (0-2s) background UI settles; beat 2 (2-4s) CTA fades in and holds
fields.constraints: single clear CTA only; keep text perfectly legible
fields.negative: no real people, no copyrighted logos, no flicker
